heading: Traveling expenses
label: 103 Traveling expenses
text: There may be expended for or on account of the traveling expenses of the President of the United States such sum as Congress may from time to time appropriate, not exceeding $100,000 per annum, such sum when appropriated to be expended in the discretion of the President and accounted for on his certificate solely.
notes: Effective Date of 1978 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to any fiscal year beginning on or after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 95–570section 6(a) of Pub. L. 95–570section 102 of this titleOct. 1, 1978
